title: Website Development
desc: Build fast, modern, and conversion-optimized websites tailored to your brand.
longDesc: Media Pro builds production-grade websites using modern frameworks — from landing pages to full custom web applications. Every site is SEO-ready, mobile-first, and built to convert visitors into customers.
keyOutcome: Clients see up to 3× more leads within 90 days of launching a new site.

title: Meta Ads
desc: Reach your ideal audience on Facebook and Instagram with precision ad campaigns.
longDesc: Media Pro manages full-funnel Meta advertising — from audience research and creative production to A/B testing and performance scaling. Management starts at USD 750/month plus ad spend.
keyOutcome: 45% average conversion rate lift across managed Meta campaigns.

title: Google Ads
desc: Capture high-intent customers at the exact moment they're searching for you.
longDesc: Search, display, shopping, and Performance Max campaigns managed end-to-end. Media Pro builds campaigns that maximize return on ad spend (ROAS) with continuous optimization. Starts at USD 750/month plus ad spend.
keyOutcome: Clients consistently achieve ROAS above industry benchmark within 60 days.

title: Business Consulting
desc: Get expert strategic guidance to accelerate growth and sharpen your competitive edge.
longDesc: Media Pro's consulting service covers digital strategy audits, growth roadmaps, marketing stack reviews, and go-to-market planning. Available as hourly sessions (USD 200/hr) or packaged strategy engagements.
keyOutcome: Clients who complete a strategy audit reduce wasted ad spend by an average of 35%.

title: SEO
desc: Dominate search rankings and drive sustainable organic traffic to your business.
longDesc: Media Pro's SEO service covers technical audits, on-page optimization, link building, and content strategy. Long-term retainers start at USD 1,200/month with meaningful improvements visible in 3–6 months.
keyOutcome: 180% organic traffic increase documented across client portfolio.

title: Server Maintenance
desc: Keep your infrastructure fast, secure, and always online with proactive management.
longDesc: Media Pro handles server provisioning, performance monitoring, security patching, backup management, and uptime optimization. Whether on AWS, DigitalOcean, or custom VPS — we keep your stack running at peak performance.
keyOutcome: 99.9% uptime maintained across all managed server environments.
